title: Saheba
desc: Manu, an ideal youngster, leads a contented life until he comes across Nandini, who is striving to make it big in life. He leaves no stone unturned and helps her gain fame and success.

title: Melkote Manja
desc: Jaggesh, always in debt, finds unexpected allies among his debtors, who hilariously come to his rescue. Set in picturesque Melkote, it's a fun watch!

title: Ghost
desc: A gangster and his team hijack a prison in the city on a quest for justice. They threaten to release all the criminals.

title: Doddmane Hudga
desc: Surya, estranged from his wealthy family after being ignored by his father, returns years later to protect their land from a vile villain.

title: Bhairathi Ranagal
desc: Bhairathi Ranagal ends up in jail after going against the law. However, when he is released, he strives to fight for the people of his village.

title: Kalidasa Kannada Meshtru
desc: When the existence of his school is threatened, Kalidasa, a Kannada teacher who loves teaching the language, raises his voice against the education system that leans towards private schools.
